Pokémon Go Card List

Sword & Shield series · Released July 1, 2022 · 88 cards

Browse the full Pokémon Go set. Tap any card to check its value, rarity and pricing history in the TCG Companion app.

Premium binders built for TCG collectors

Use code TCGCOMPANION for 10% off at vaultx.com

Shop binders →

Check Pokémon Go card values

Scan a card with your phone camera and get the current market price in seconds. TCG Companion covers every English Pokémon set, tracks your collection value, and spots fakes before you buy.

Download on the App Store

Browse all sets · Pokémon card value checker

TCG Companion

Scan any Pokémon card. See the price. Track your collection.

  • Pokémon card scanner
  • Card value checker
